Event: The Desert Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/11/2022
Sage Bot Item Code: A51


Other locations the gear can be found

Mystic Dragon
Feathered Companion

Triggers: Once in a while

The ally with the lowest max health gets a small helper that restores 4% of their max health every second. The ally attacks also deal 55000 additional pure damage. The helper protects the ally for 5 sec, then restores 14% of the owner max health.

Requirements: 90-100
